label: EMA Crossover
signal: Dual EMA crossover with 200-bar trend filter; ATR stop; no overnight.
description: EMA crossover on 5-minute intraday bars. Enters long when fast EMA > slow EMA > 200-bar trend EMA; enters short when the reverse is true. Uses an ATR-based stop loss. Holds position until stop is hit or end of day — no overnight carries.
reference: Proprietary — classic dual-EMA crossover with trend filter and ATR stop, adapted to 5-min multi-asset ETFs
